SAGE Labs Stats

SAGE Labs has only been live for less than 20 hours, and we're already witnessing an incredible surge in fleets venturing into deep space! Stats below.  

 2900+ profiles created 
 290,000+ Solana transactions 
 4800+ fleets created 25,000+ SDUs found

If you find these stats interesting, look forward to even more insight in our next economics quarterly report!
